basics.name: 金军
basics.label: 酒店管理 · 专升本在读
basics.summary: 亳州学院酒店管理专业专升本在读。系统学习服务管理、运营流程、商务礼仪等专业知识，理论基础扎实，实训成绩名列前茅。拥有正规公司市场推广实习经历与星级酒店标准化实训经验，具备规范的服务素养、良好的职业形象与高效的执行能力。

work.name: 安徽小库教育科技有限公司
work.summary: 负责线下市场推广、用户引流及活动执行工作。
highlights: 负责线下市场地推、用户引流、场景宣传等基础推广工作，熟悉线下获客流程，具备基础市场洞察与推广执行能力
协助团队完成营销活动策划落地、物料布置、现场执行、人员对接、流程跟进等工作，保障各类市场活动顺利落地
主动对接客户咨询、耐心解答问题，积累了扎实的沟通表达、临场应变、统筹协调能力，抗压能力与落地执行力突出

volunteer.summary: 负责新生报到引导、路线指引、物资分发、问题答疑等志愿服务工作。
highlights: 耐心对接师生，积极配合团队完成统筹工作
有效锻炼了沟通协调、服务对接与团队协作能力，责任心强、执行力高

projects.name: 亳州桐禧东方酒店 · 餐饮岗位实训
projects.description: 熟练掌握星级酒店餐饮全套标准化服务流程，涵盖餐前筹备、宾客接待、餐桌布置、席间服务、餐后整理等工作。严格遵守服务礼仪规范，细节把控到位，具备良好的客户服务意识与现场应变能力。

projects.name: 亳州富力万达嘉华酒店 · 前厅客房岗位实训
projects.description: 熟悉高端星级酒店前厅接待、入住退房办理、客房巡检、客房标准化整理等业务流程。熟悉服务行业标准化管理模式，做事严谨细致，具备规范化、流程化的工作思维。

awards.title: 普通话二级乙等
awards.summary: 语言表达清晰流畅，适合服务、行政、文职、运营类沟通型岗位

basics.name: Jin Jun
basics.label: Hospitality Management · Undergraduate
basics.summary: Hospitality Management student at Bozhou University (top-up degree). Systematically studied service management, operational processes, and business etiquette with solid theoretical foundations and top practical training scores. Possesses formal corporate marketing internship experience and standardized hotel training, demonstrating professional service skills and efficient execution.

work.name: Anhui Xiaoku Education Technology Co., Ltd.
work.summary: Responsible for offline marketing, user acquisition, and event execution.
highlights: Conducted offline ground promotion, user acquisition, and on-site marketing activities, mastering offline customer acquisition processes
Assisted team in planning and executing marketing campaigns, including material preparation, on-site coordination, and process follow-up
Proactively handled customer inquiries with strong communication, adaptability, and coordination skills under pressure

volunteer.summary: Guided new students, provided directions, distributed materials, and answered questions.
highlights: Patiently assisted faculty and students, actively collaborated with team
Developed communication, coordination, and teamwork skills with strong sense of responsibility

projects.name: Tongxi Oriental Hotel · F&B Training
projects.description: Mastered the full standardized F&B service workflow of a star-rated hotel, including pre-meal preparation, guest reception, table setting, in-meal service, and post-meal cleanup. Strictly adhered to service etiquette with strong attention to detail and customer service awareness.

projects.name: Wanda Realm Bozhou · Front Office & Housekeeping Training
projects.description: Familiar with front office reception, check-in/check-out procedures, room inspection, and standardized housekeeping workflows of a premium hotel. Understood standardized service management with a meticulous, process-oriented work approach.

awards.title: Mandarin Proficiency Level 2-B
awards.summary: Clear and fluent verbal communication, suitable for service, administrative, and communication-oriented roles
